text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh my, Trainer... Your hair's sticking<n>straight up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. It almost reminds me of an<n>Umamusume's
ears.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I suppose that means we match today.<n>Hehe. ♪
